topPlaces.name: Rama Lakshamana Temple, Baradia
topPlaces.description: The Rama Lakshamana Temples or Samba Lakshamana Temples is the late 12th century twin Hindu temples in Baradia, a village in Okhamandal region of Devbhoomi Dwarka district, Gujarat, India. Baradia is about five km southeast of Dwarka.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kalika Mata Temple, New Dhrewad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kalika Mata Temple, New Dhrewad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kalika Mata Temple, New Dhrewad?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Porbandar Airport (82 km) and the nearest railway station is Rajkot Junction (177 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kalika Mata Temple, New Dhrewad?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kalika Mata Temple, New Dhrewad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kalika Mata Temple, New Dhrewad?
faq.a: Stays in Kalika Mata Temple, New Dhrewad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kalika Mata Temple, New Dhrewad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Rama Lakshamana Temple, Baradia.
